욥기 37:1.content: “Yes, at this my heart trembles, and is moved out of its place.

욥기 37:2.content: Hear, oh, hear the noise of his voice, the sound that goes out of his mouth.

욥기 37:3.content: He sends it out under the whole sky, and his lightning to the ends of the earth.

욥기 37:4.content: After it a voice roars. He thunders with the voice of his majesty. He doesn’t hold back anything when his voice is heard.

욥기 37:5.content: God thunders marvelously with his voice. He does great things, which we can’t comprehend.

욥기 37:6.content: For he says to the snow, ‘Fall on the earth,’ likewise to the shower of rain, and to the showers of his mighty rain.

욥기 37:7.content: He seals up the hand of every man, that all men whom he has made may know it.

욥기 37:8.content: Then the animals take cover, and remain in their dens.

욥기 37:9.content: Out of its room comes the storm, and cold out of the north.

욥기 37:10.content: By the breath of God, ice is given, and the width of the waters is frozen.

욥기 37:11.content: Yes, he loads the thick cloud with moisture. He spreads abroad the cloud of his lightning.

욥기 37:12.content: It is turned around by his guidance, that they may do whatever he commands them on the surface of the habitable world,

욥기 37:13.content: Whether it is for correction, or for his land, or for loving kindness, that he causes it to come.

욥기 37:14.content: “Listen to this, Job. Stand still, and consider the wondrous works of God.

욥기 37:15.content: Do you know how God controls them, and causes the lightning of his cloud to shine?

욥기 37:16.content: Do you know the workings of the clouds, the wondrous works of him who is perfect in knowledge?

욥기 37:17.content: You whose clothing is warm, when the earth is still by reason of the south wind?

욥기 37:18.content: Can you, with him, spread out the sky, which is strong as a cast metal mirror?

욥기 37:19.content: Teach us what we will tell him, for we can’t make our case by reason of darkness.

욥기 37:20.content: Will it be told him that I would speak? Or should a man wish that he were swallowed up?

욥기 37:21.content: Now men don’t see the light which is bright in the skies, but the wind passes, and clears them.

욥기 37:22.content: Out of the north comes golden splendor. With God is awesome majesty.

욥기 37:23.content: We can’t reach the Almighty. He is exalted in power. In justice and great righteousness, he will not oppress.

욥기 37:24.content: Therefore men revere him. He doesn’t regard any who are wise of heart.”
